headline: HCA Healthcare Trims 2026 Profit Outlook, Stock Falls
summary: HCA Healthcare Inc.’s (NYSE:HCA) stock is trading lower on Tuesday after cutting its fiscal 2026 earnings guidance from $29.10-$31.50 to $28.70-$30.50. The company also narrowed its 2026 sales guidance from $76.5 billion-$80 billion to $77 billion-$79.5 billion, versus the consensus of $78.643 billion. After the update, the stock fell around 10% during the premarket session. The hospital operator reported preliminary second-quarter revenue of approximately $20.23 billion, up from $18.61 billion

headline: HCA Healthcare Lowers 2026 Earnings Forecast Following Insurance Coverage Shift (HCA)
summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) released preliminary second-quarter 2026 financial results while reducing its full-year earnings outlook, as a growing number of uninsured patients weighed on profitability following changes in health insurance exchange coverage.

headline: HCA Healthcare Previews Second Quarter 2026 Results
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., July 14, 2026--HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) today announced preliminary financial and operating results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2026. The preliminary financial and operating results are subject to finalization of the Company's quarterly financial and accounting procedures.

headline: HCA cuts 2026 earnings forecast on insurance coverage losses
summary: Payer mix changes, mostly from people dropping out of Affordable Care Act plans, caused HCA to lose $400 million in the second quarter — much more than the company (or its investors) had expected.

raw.headline: HCA cuts 2026 earnings forecast on insurance coverage losses
raw.summary: Payer mix changes, mostly from people dropping out of Affordable Care Act plans, caused HCA to lose $400 million in the second quarter — much more than the company (or its investors) had expected.
